applications.domain: Ratio fluorometric determination of ATP base
applications.performance: linear range of 5.0x10-8 molL-1 to 2.0x10 -6 mol L-1. The detection limit was calculated to be 2.0x10-8 molL-1
applications.comparative_advantage: the proposed ratio fluorometric method can eliminate environmental influence to make it wider linear range, higher sensitive and higher precision

feedback.label: Bad
feedback.expert_comment: Incomplete Structure: The entire section 'carbon_dots -> general_info -> alternative_names' was incorrectly omitted. The JSON is missing a mandatory structural block. | Omission Error: The field 'carbon_dots -> synthesis -> method -> type' contained 'pyrolysis' in the source text, but it was extracted as null/missing. | Numerical Hallucination: The correct value for carbon_dots -> properties -> optical -> emission_max was ' 440 nm', but the model hallucinated ' 3100.66 nm'.
